title: EndShip overhaul
description: this project makes it so every end city spawns with an end ship and can spawn with even more
body:
More Endships is a Minecraft mod that expands the mysterious End dimension by introducing a fleet of new End Ships scattered across the void. Designed for adventurers who crave more post-Ender Dragon content, this mod transforms the sparse End islands into a thriving network of airborne vessels, each with unique loot, layouts, and challenges.

Instead of finding a single End Ship per city, players will encounter multiple ships per structure — some docked, others floating freely. Each ship is procedurally placed and varies in size, orientation, and cargo. Some contain rare enchanted gear, others house multiple shulkers, and a few even feature custom mini-bosses or redstone puzzles. The mod integrates seamlessly with vanilla generation and supports both Fabric and Forge loaders.

Whether you're hunting Elytras, farming shulker shells, or just exploring the void, More Endships adds replayability and depth to the late game. It’s perfect for modpacks focused on exploration, loot progression, or multiplayer adventure. The mod is lightweight, configurable, and compatible with most worldgen mods.

With a clean Modrinth icon and active development, More Endships is ready to become a staple in your modded Minecraft experience. Download it today and turn the End into a skybound frontier worth conquering.
